name: Denied workers comp for my hand injury in West Jordan, now what?
description: Appeal within 20 days with more proof.[5]

mainEntity.name: Denied workers comp for my hand injury in West Jordan, now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal within 20 days with more proof.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Appeal the denial within 20 days in Utah by requesting a hearing.**[5]

Common denial reasons: late report, not work-related, or pre-existing condition. Provide more evidence to overturn.

- Gather additional medical opinions.
- File objection with Labor Commission.
- Hearing before administrative law judge.

Hire an attorney; success rate jumps 3x. Deadlines are strict.
